mapper.select: SELECT lr.id, lr.student_id, su.real_name AS student_name, sp.student_no, ci.class_name, lr.leave_type, lr.reason, DATE_FORMAT(lr.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(lr.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS end_time, lr.proof_url, lr.status, DATE_FORMAT(lr.submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS submitted_at FROM leave_request lr JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = lr.student_id JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.user_id = lr.student_id JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = sp.class_id AND ci.head_teacher_id = #{counselorId} WHERE lr.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY lr.id DESC

SELECT lr.id, su.real_name AS student_name, sp.student_no, ci.class_name, lr.leave_type, lr.reason, DATE_FORMAT(lr.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(lr.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS end_time, lr.status, DATE_FORMAT(lr.submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS submitted_at, approver.real_name AS approver_name, DATE_FORMAT(la.acted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS acted_at, la.comment FROM leave_request lr JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = lr.student_id JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.user_id = lr.student_id JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = sp.class_id AND ci.head_teacher_id = #{counselorId} LEFT JOIN leave_approval la ON la.leave_request_id = lr.id LEFT JOIN sys_user approver ON approver.id = la.approver_id WHERE lr.status IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY lr.id DESC

SELECT ci.id, ci.class_code, ci.class_name, ci.capacity, ci.remark, COUNT(DISTINCT sp.user_id) AS student_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN lr.status = 'PENDING' THEN lr.id END) AS pending_leave_count FROM class_info ci LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.class_id = ci.id LEFT JOIN leave_request lr ON lr.student_id = sp.user_id AND lr.status = 'PENDING' WHERE ci.head_teacher_id = #{counselorId} AND ci.status = 1 GROUP BY ci.id, ci.class_code, ci.class_name, ci.capacity ORDER BY ci.id

SELECT su.id AS user_id, sp.student_no, su.real_name, su.phone, COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 END) AS present_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'ABSENT' THEN 1 END) AS absent_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'LATE' THEN 1 END) AS late_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN ar.status = 'LEAVE' THEN 1 END) AS leave_count FROM student_profile sp JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = sp.user_id JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = sp.class_id AND ci.head_teacher_id = #{counselorId} LEFT JOIN attendance_record ar ON ar.student_id = su.id AND ar.class_id = sp.class_id WHERE sp.class_id = #{classId} GROUP BY su.id, sp.student_no, su.real_name, su.phone ORDER BY sp.student_no

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class_info WHERE head_teacher_id = #{counselorId} AND status = 1) AS classCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_profile sp JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = sp.class_id WHERE ci.head_teacher_id = #{counselorId}) AS studentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leave_request lr JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.user_id = lr.student_id JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = sp.class_id WHERE ci.head_teacher_id = #{counselorId} AND lr.status = 'PENDING') AS pendingLeaveCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leave_request lr JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.user_id = lr.student_id JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = sp.class_id WHERE ci.head_teacher_id = #{counselorId} AND lr.status IN ('APPROVED','REJECTED') AND lr.submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)) AS recentHandledCount
